title: Beta Atmosphere - Horror Project
description: Nostalgia and terror arrive in an old version of Minecraft.
body:
A Minecraft horror experience with mods like:

000.jar

IN YOUR WORLD

FROM THE FOG

[FAKE PLAYER](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-fake-player/files/5468527)(If you want to play with this mod download it)

CAVE DWELLER

NOSTALGIC TWEAKS

FARLANDS REBORN

MODERNER BETA

And GOLDEN DAYS RESOURCE PACK

controllers are compatible🎮

WARNING: This Modpack will not have future updates

THIS MODPACK IS NOT COPYRIGHTED

[Twitter](https://x.com/GustavoGM9093)

This modpack have:

classic style (like fog)

classic look

horror atmosphere

customize setings

zoom

easy to play with friends and more (press "J" key to share your world, if you add someone in essential mod, they will be able to join the world)

Cool things:
in the data packs tab when creating the world, there is a data pack that limits the minimum of the damned Y to 0 (Y = 0)
note: needs to be activated
![dataPack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48eda1ee03fb72896ddae2878291bfcf7a3dc0cf.png)

and also new world generetion options

Detailed description:

This modpack combines optimized performance, classic nostalgia, and a dose of mystery and horror. Whether you're revisiting Minecraft's roots, exploring new challenges, or facing the unknown, this collection of mods provides a complete experience for players of all styles.

---

---1. Performance and Visuals
- Enhanced Optimization: Mods like Embeddium and Dynamic Lights ensure smooth graphics and dynamic lighting, even on less powerful machines.
- Modern Visuals: GeckoLib takes things to the next level with support for complex animations, bringing more life to the game world.

---

---2. Nostalgia and Classic Style
- Reliving the Classics:
- Golden Days Base and Nostalgic Tweaks recreate the visuals and mechanics of older versions, bringing back the magic of Minecraft’s early days.
- Console Edition Tutorial Worlds: Revisit the iconic tutorial world from the console edition, a true time capsule for nostalgic fans.

---

---3. Convenience and Socialization
- Multiplayer Interaction:
- Simple Voice Chat: Add voice communication for more immersive group adventures.
- Essential Mod: Makes multiplayer gameplay easier and more fun for exploring worlds with friends.
- Customized Gameplay:
- Controllable: Full controller support, perfect for players who prefer a console-style experience.

---

---4. Reimagined Adventures
- Unique Exploration:
- Farlands Reborn*: Revives the legendary Farlands, offering a mythical experience full of new challenges.

---5. Adventure and Horror
- Dark and Mysterious Atmosphere:
- From The Fog: Inspired by the Herobrine legend, featuring events and appearances that challenge logic and heighten tension.
- In Your World: Turns the game world into an environment of constant watchfulness and dread.
- ooo.jar: Disrupts routine with unsettling and unexpected situations that challenge even the bravest players.
- Fake player: adds a strange player(you need to [download](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-fake-player/files/5468527) if you want)

- Perilous Exploration:
- Cave Dweller Reimagined: Reimagines Minecraft's caves as haunting locations where a creature observes and hunts you.

Story:
You are going to play an old version of Minecraft, but strange things happen.
